name: construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, inaccurate progress reporting causes budget overruns. We provide automated progress reports and cost estimates instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate progress reports and cost estimates lead to budget overruns.
features: manual data entry for job site updates
